concerns.text: SC-010 (Phase 2+) explicitly requires 'Validation results documented in `docs/reproducibility/algorithm_validation.md`' but this file is NOT listed in the plan's Project Structure. All other SC file requirements (SC-001, SC-005, SC-007, SC-008, SC-011, SC-012, SC-013, SC-014) are listed in the Project Structure. Add algorithm_validation.md to ensure complete spec coverage for Phase 2+ algorithm validation.

FR-006/SC-009 require reporting correlation coefficients and descriptive comparison metrics (mean difference, variance ratio, Cohen's d) for alternating vs. non-alternating groups, but no dedicated output file is specified in the Project Structure. While results could be part of existing reports (e.g., data_quality_report.md), the plan should explicitly document where these metrics will be recorded for traceability.

FR-010/SC-006 require logging counts of knots with ambiguous alternating classification that are excluded or marked unclassifiable. The spec says 'with count logged' but no dedicated file is specified in the Project Structure. Consider adding to data_quality_report.md or creating a dedicated log file for explicit traceability.
